news_results.title: cTrader vs MT4: Why One Platform Could Cost You Profits
news_results.description: MT4 allows traders to automate ... fully automated trading without manual intervention. Its widespread adoption means that almost every broker supports MT4, providing traders with extensive options. cTrader, developed by Spotware Systems in 2011, is considered a modern alternative to MT4. It emphasizes transparency, speed, and advanced trading features. With intuitive charting, Level II pricing, and a robust API for algorithmic ...

news_results.description: Spotware releases cTrader Admin 9.9 with email tracking in Sessions, a new Workspace settings app and a collapsible main menu, improving daily platform administration and ensuring consistent operational control.
